messages.content: <image>\nWhat's the name of the central figure in this photograph?
The central figure in this photograph is President Donald Trump.
<image>\nWho is the main character depicted in this image?
The main character depicted in this image is President Donald Trump.
<image>\nWhat name is given to the principal character in this image?
The name given to the principal character in this image is 'Donald Trump.'
<image>\nCan you name the main person depicted in this picture?
The main person depicted in this picture is President Donald Trump.
